evaluation_method: 5 LLM Judges + Minority Override + G4 Originality Detection
campaign: MarbMarket - The First veDEX on MegaETH is Launching
mission: Explain the veDEX Model & Why MarbMarket Matters
best_content:
Been thinking about how most DEX launches feel the same. VC money, presales, the whole circus. Then MarbMarket drops with a fair launch on MegaETH. No VCs. No presales. Just a veDEX that lets the community actually call the shots.

veDEX isn't just another AMM. It's about locking MARB to get voting power. Longer locks = more influence. Projects pay bribes to attract votes. You vote weekly on where emissions go. Your lock duration actually matters. That's the ve(3,3) model in action.

The loop is wild: MARB lockers direct emissions to LPs. LPs get rewards. Protocols pay bribes for votes. Incentives flow back to lockers. It's a self-reinforcing cycle that rewards actual participation, not just early money.

@RallyOnChain is tracking this closely. MarbMarket's launch feels different. Not because it's "groundbreaking" but because it's actually fair. x.com/Marb_market

What happens when the community controls the incentives instead of VCs?
qa_comments: Finally a launch that isn't rigged for insiders from day one.
This ve(3,3) model on MegaETH is going to be massive for real yield.
Love seeing the community actually have a say in where the emissions go.
